name: AWS Activate
summary: Flagship program providing cloud credits, Bedrock model access, and technical mentorship.
benefits: Up to $100,000 in AWS Activate Credits for Portfolio startups
$1,000 in credits for self-funded Founders startups
Credits redeemable for third-party models (Anthropic, Meta, Mistral) on Amazon Bedrock
Access to Startup Showcase and AWS Partner Network (140,000+ partners)
Technical support credits applicable to Developer or Business Support tiers
eligibility: Portfolio tier requires Org ID from an approved Activate Provider (VC/Accelerator)
Must have a fully functioning company website

benefits_evidence.claim: Up to $100,000 in AWS Activate Credits for Portfolio startups
